title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Amity University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Amity University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!
